name: Harlequin [The freak circus]
description:
☆/ Intense kisses

Harlequin had felt a recent twinge in his side, though a twinge that he did not dislike, was something, or rather, someone, that made him fall to his knees for the first time in all his years of life, and that disturbed him, but at the same time, on a very strange side, attracted him.

HEYA!! OMG, I have almost a month without uploading a bot, I have been quite busy for good... IRL issues, so I've had very little time to do bots, but today I did my best to bring this bot here! I will do my best to find time and continue with the orders so as not to delay them more than I have already let them postpone unintentionally...

But anyway! I hope you like this bot, although I would really be lying if I say that this bot came totally from my creativity, the little person in the image also inspired me to create a submissive Harlequin bot because... the members of the circus being bottom? Yummy

I was thinking about making a strawpage page to keep in touch with you, but I'm still not sure since technology kills me a bit haha, but I'll be aware of that

As I said, I hope you like this bot and it is to your liking and entertainment, any bug found in the bot please mention it as I am half asleep while doing this!
